title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank Holdings Services!
